# Imotara

> Imotara is a free, private AI emotional wellness companion available on web, Android, and iOS. It helps users talk about their feelings, track mood over time, and receive gentle AI-powered reflections — in 22 languages, with no ads, no surveillance, and full privacy control.

## What is Imotara?

Imotara (pronounced "ih-moh-TAR-ah") is an AI companion app built for emotional wellness and self-reflection. It is not a therapy app or a medical service — it is a private, non-judgmental space where anyone can talk about how they feel, understand their emotional patterns, and find gentle support at any hour of the day.

The name "Imotara" reflects its core idea: an immortal friend for your emotions — a companion that remembers, learns, and grows alongside you over time.

Imotara was built in India and is designed to be accessible to people globally, especially those who speak Indian languages.

## Core purpose

- Give people a safe, private space to express emotions without fear of judgment
- Help users understand their emotional patterns over time through mood history
- Provide gentle AI reflections that feel like a thoughtful friend — not a clinical chatbot
- Be accessible in 22 languages, including 11 Indian languages
- Protect privacy: all data stays on the user's device by default

## Key features

- **Private AI chat**: Emotional support conversations powered by advanced language models
- **Mood history timeline**: Visual record of emotional patterns over days, weeks, months
- **22 languages**: English, Hindi, Bengali, Marathi, Tamil, Telugu, Gujarati, Punjabi, Kannada, Malayalam, Odia, Urdu, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Russian, Arabic, Chinese, Japanese, Hebrew, Indonesian
- **Local-first storage**: All data stays on the device by default — no account required
- **Optional cloud sync**: Cross-device sync available with explicit user consent only
- **Voice input**: Speak your thoughts on mobile apps
- **Offline support**: Works without internet (PWA on web, native offline on mobile)
- **No ads, no social feed, no public profiles**: Purely personal, never monetised through attention
- **Breathing and mindfulness exercises**: Built-in tools for grounding
- **Companion persona**: Optional named AI companion with customisable personality tone
- **Conversation search and bookmarks**: Find and save important reflections
- **Emotion trend analysis**: Weekly and monthly mood summaries

## Platform availability

- **Web app (PWA)**: https://imotara.com — works on any browser, installable as a PWA
- **Android app**: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.imotara.imotara
- **iOS app**: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/imotara/id6756697569

## Who Imotara is for

Imotara is designed for:
- Anyone who wants a private, non-judgmental space to process emotions
- People who find traditional journaling hard to maintain
- Users who want AI emotional support without giving up privacy
- People who want to understand their emotional patterns over time
- Anyone looking for a mental wellness app that respects their data
- Non-English speakers, especially speakers of Indian regional languages
- People in countries where mental health support is expensive or inaccessible

## How Imotara works

1. User types (or speaks) how they are feeling
2. Imotara responds with a reflection — empathetic, contextual, non-directive
3. Emotional tone is detected and logged to the mood timeline
4. Over time, Imotara builds a picture of the user's emotional patterns
5. Weekly reflections and trend summaries help the user understand themselves better
6. All of this happens locally on the device unless the user opts into cloud sync

## Privacy model

- No account required to use the app
- All conversations stored on the user's device (AsyncStorage on mobile, localStorage on web)
- Optional cloud sync requires explicit sign-in and consent
- No third-party analytics, no advertising, no data selling
- Conversations are never used to train AI models
- User can export or delete all their data at any time

## Pricing

- **Free tier**: Full access to all core features — unlimited conversations, mood timeline, 22 languages
- **Imotara Plus / Pro**: Optional subscription for advanced features including cloud sync across devices, extended conversation history, and priority AI responses
- No paywalls on core emotional support functionality

## Technical details

- Built with React Native (Expo) for iOS and Android
- Web app built with Next.js (deployed on Vercel)
- Backend on Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth)
- AI: GPT-4.1-mini for cloud-based reflections; local fallback mode for offline/privacy use
- Text-to-speech: Azure Neural TTS with 40+ voice options
- Supports Progressive Web App (PWA) installation

## What makes Imotara different

- **Privacy-first**: Unlike most wellness apps, Imotara works entirely offline without sharing data
- **Indian-made for the world**: Rare focus on Indian regional languages in AI wellness
- **No manipulation**: No streaks, no push guilt, no social pressure — just quiet support
- **Companion model**: Relationship-based interaction rather than clinical Q&A
- **Non-commercial ethos**: No ads, no data monetisation

## Comparison with similar apps

- vs. Wysa / Woebot: Imotara is local-first and privacy-preserving; others require accounts and cloud storage
- vs. Replika: Imotara focuses on emotional wellness and self-reflection, not romantic companionship
- vs. Headspace / Calm: Imotara is conversation-based, not guided meditation
- vs. journaling apps (Day One, Reflectly): Imotara adds AI reflection and emotional pattern analysis

## Frequently asked questions

**Q: Is Imotara free?**
A: Yes. Imotara is free to use. All core features — AI chat, mood timeline, 22 languages, offline support — are available at no cost. Optional subscription plans exist for advanced features.

**Q: Is my data private?**
A: Yes. All conversations are stored only on your device by default. Cloud sync is optional and requires sign-in with explicit consent. No ads, no data selling, no analytics tracking.

**Q: What languages does Imotara support?**
A: 22 languages: English, Hindi, Bengali, Marathi, Tamil, Telugu, Gujarati, Punjabi, Kannada, Malayalam, Odia, Urdu, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Russian, Arabic, Chinese, Japanese, Hebrew, and Indonesian.

**Q: Is there an Imotara mobile app?**
A: Yes. Imotara is available on Android (Google Play) and iOS (App Store). There is also a web app at https://imotara.com that installs as a PWA.

**Q: Is Imotara a replacement for therapy?**
A: No. Imotara is a private wellness companion for self-reflection, not a medical or therapeutic service. It is designed to complement — not replace — professional mental health care. Users in crisis are directed to local emergency resources.

**Q: Can I use Imotara offline?**
A: Yes. The web app works offline as a PWA. Mobile apps support offline use with local AI responses and local storage.

**Q: Does Imotara work without creating an account?**
A: Yes. You can use all core features without any account. An account is only required for optional cloud sync across devices.

**Q: What AI powers Imotara?**
A: Imotara uses GPT-4.1-mini for cloud-based reflections. The app also includes a local AI mode that works fully offline without any external AI service.

**Q: Is Imotara safe for teens?**
A: Imotara includes safety features including crisis detection and referral to professional resources. Users under 13 are advised to use the app with a parent or guardian.

**Q: Where is Imotara made?**
A: Imotara is built in India by Soumen Roy. It is designed to be accessible globally with a particular focus on Indian language speakers.
